headline: Dominion Energy Announces First-Quarter 2026 Results
summary: RICHMOND, Va., May 01, 2026--Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE: D), today announced unaudited net income determined in accordance with Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP, or reported earnings) for the three months ended March 31, 2026, of $621 million ($0.69 per share) compared with net income of $665 million ($0.77 per share) for the same period in 2025.
